falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 (10% above its 2024 August peak) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would invalidate the bottom pattern by confirming a continuation of the prior uptrend rather than a reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 65+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant escalation in blowoff pressure would contradict the current HOLD signal by indicating extreme overbought conditions rather than a consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic policy shift would invalidate the current market phase by introducing massive liquidity that would prevent the pattern from completing its expected trajectory

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
